# Copilot Instructions

- In `*.gd` files, always use tab indentation (no spaces for leading indentation).
- Match the existing indentation style of the file when generating or editing code.
- Do not mix tabs and spaces in the same GDScript file.
- Any new code block added via Copilot Chat must include a brief marker comment indicating it was added by Copilot, using the file's comment syntax (for GDScript: `# Added by Copilot`).
